description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a hidden job template .test_node_template using the job name as the Docker image, runs a before_script that prints system information with uname -a and installs libudev-dev and libusb-1.0-0-dev via apt-get, and defines two jobs named node:10 and node:8 that inherit this template. Each job uses its respective Docker image (node:10 or node:8), then executes node --version, npm install --build-from-source=usb, and npm test. The pipeline has no explicit stages, artifacts, caches, or rules, and runs on every pipeline execution.
